productDisplayName: Baggit Women Fiancee Taj Brown Belt
description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this slim belt from baggit is made of textured synthetic leather for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Textured upper with contrasting stitch detail Tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
